answer.description: leads with an investment highlight / strength area from the payload
frames the business around strengths / investment highlights
a buyer-facing CIM must not state a dollar valuation, an enterprise value, or a purchase price ('No asking price is stated' disclaimers are allowed, so that phrase is deliberately not matched)
must not surface the internal DRS / diligence readiness score
must not name a gap or weakness (buyer-facing, strengths only)
must use only numbers present in the payload (numeral firewall)

source.description: the lead strength named in the CIM traces to a highlights entry in the payload

every market figure stated (a numeral from a retrieved market_context passage) carries its [cite_id] on the same line, so an advisor can attribute it to its licensed source; a CIM with no market_context is not penalized
